strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing tooling authorship
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java exposure appears limited and dated
Vitest not explicitly named, though Jest-era testing expertise is evident

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in stated stack

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years of experience, strong TypeScript/Node.js and React background, and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling work that maps to the role's internal automation focus. Engineering rigor (TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks) and polyglot breadth align well with the team's stack, though Nest.js and Kotlin are not explicitly demonstrated and would need to be probed in interview.
